## Summary

A clear, one-line description of the bug.

## Environment

- App version / commit SHA:
- Databricks workspace host (cloud + region, e.g. `https://XXX.cloud.databricks.com`):
- Browser + OS (for UI issues):
- Python version (for local dev):

## Steps to reproduce

1. …
2. …
3. …

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Logs

Paste relevant server logs from the Databricks App (`databricks apps logs conversions-api-app`) or browser console output. Redact any access tokens or secrets.

## Additional context

Anything else we should know — related PRs, linked ES tickets, recent config changes.
